name: Gingerbread Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift all ingredients together into a large double thick plastic bag.
2. Cream 5 tablespoons margarine with 1/3 cup granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in an egg, then stir in the molasses and warm water alternately with 2 cups of the Basic Mix (see note).
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 45 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Serve warm or room temperature with whipped cream or ice cream.
Note: Additional ingredients and instructions are provided above, including the use of 1/3 cup granulated sugar, 5 tablespoons margarine, an egg, 3/4 cup molasses, and 3/4 cup warm water.
